items.title: Lovable signs multiyear deal with Google Cloud to up usage 5x, source says
items.summary: Lovable and Google signed an expanded multiyear deal that involves a 5x expansion of Lovable's footprint on Google Cloud, and expanded access to Anthropic Claude.

items.title: Alphabet’s record-breaking $85B raise for Google’s AI business is a helluva good signal
items.summary: If Alphabet's record-breaking $85 billion stock sale signals investor appetite for AI-related offerings, we can see that investors are ready to chow.

items.title: Google’s Dreambeans, its weirdest-named AI tool to date, will turn your life into a cartoon
items.summary: Dreambeans is a curated list of AI-illustrated "stories" culled from the personal data in your Google account.

items.title: Amazon will show AI product images when you search for some reason
items.summary: Amazon will use visual search and AI to show AI-generated product images that match your search queries. The retailer says it will help guide users to products.

items.title: These two founders left Goldman and Meta to build voice AI for markets everyone else overlooked
items.summary: The startup's own stack for Africa and Middle East is now handling more than 17,000 calls per day.

items.title: Publishers will be able to opt out of AI Search, thanks to new regulation
items.summary: U.K. regulators are requiring Google offer a tool allowing website publishers to opt-out of generative AI search features. The option will be tested in the U.K. then rolled out globally.

items.title: Meta’s AI agent for WhatsApp Business is now available globally
items.summary: WhatsApp will charge businesses for using its AI agent based on token usage.

items.title: Introducing new capabilities to GPT-Rosalind
items.summary: GPT-Rosalind advances life sciences research with enhanced biological reasoning, medicinal chemistry expertise, genomics analysis, and experimental workflow capabilities.

items.title: Coralogix raises $200M on bet that someone needs to watch the AI agents
items.summary: Coralogix is among a growing number of infrastructure firms betting that as AI systems move into production, demand will rise for tools that can monitor their behavior, troubleshoot failures, and provide the operational data needed to keep them runni

items.title: How Wasmer used Codex to build a Node.js runtime for the edge
items.summary: See how Wasmer used Codex with GPT-5.5 to build a Node.js runtime for the edge, accelerating development 10x to 20x and shipping in weeks instead of months.

items.title: A blueprint for democratic governance of frontier AI
items.summary: OpenAI outlines a blueprint for U.S. governance of frontier AI, proposing a federal framework for safety, resilience, and national security.

items.title: OpenAI public policy agenda
items.summary: OpenAI outlines its public policy agenda for AI, including safety, youth protection, workforce transition, and global standards to ensure AI benefits society.

items.title: Cyera eyes $12B valuation at 80x ARR multiple despite operating losses
items.summary: The cybersecurity company is nearing a $300 million round led by Evolution Equity Partners.

items.title: Uber caps employee AI spending after blowing through budget in 4 months
items.summary: Uber's cutback has occurred after the company had reportedly encouraged staff to use AI as much as possible.

items.title: New Microsoft tool lets devs spin up AI behavior tests using text descriptions
items.summary: Microsoft on Tuesday took the wraps off Adaptive Spec-driven Scoring for Evaluation and Regression Testing, an open source framework for spinning up AI evaluations.

items.title: Martin Scorsese becomes the latest — and most unlikely — Hollywood voice for AI
items.summary: The caveat is that one of the world's most famous living directors is using the tech solely for storyboarding.

items.title: Microsoft launches Scout, an OpenClaw-inspired personal assistant
items.summary: Launched at Build, Microsoft Scout is a new AI assistant meant to bring the power and flexibility of OpenClaw into the Microsoft 365 system.

items.title: Travelers deploys AI-powered claims countrywide with OpenAI
items.summary: Travelers built an AI-powered Claim Assistant with OpenAI to guide customers through filing claims, provide 24/7 support, and scale operations during peak demand.

items.title: Codex for every role, tool, and workflow
items.summary: Discover new Codex plugins, sites, and annotations that help analysts, marketers, designers, investors, and other teams get more done with AI.

items.title: Advancing youth safety and opportunity through global leadership
items.summary: OpenAI calls for global action on youth AI safety, proposing an international institute to strengthen safeguards, standards, and opportunities for young people.

items.title: Codex is becoming a productivity tool for everyone
items.summary: The Next Era of Knowledge Work report explores how Codex is transforming productivity through AI-powered research, data analysis, workflow automation, and content creation.

items.title: Is Silicon Valley ready to put robots in people’s homes? Hello Robot is.
items.summary: The California startup released the fourth-generation of its home assistance robot, Stretch.

items.title: Apple touts $1.4 trillion in App Store billings and sales, 90% without a commission
items.summary: Apple's App Store generated $1.4 trillion in sales, up from $1.3 trillion last year, with $149 billion in sales for digital goods.

items.title: How Endava is redesigning software delivery around AI agents
items.summary: Learn how Endava is using AI agents, ChatGPT Enterprise, and Codex to accelerate software delivery, automate workflows, and build an AI-native culture across the enterprise.

items.title: Our views on AI policy and political advocacy
items.summary: Our approach to AI policy and political advocacy, transparency, support for thoughtful regulation and AI safety, and that no outside political group speaks on the company’s behalf.

items.title: Building the infrastructure for the Intelligence Age in Michigan
items.summary: OpenAI breaks ground on a 1GW data center project in Michigan as part of Stargate, building AI infrastructure to expand access, create jobs, and support communities.

items.title: OpenAI frontier models and Codex are now available on AWS
items.summary: OpenAI frontier models and Codex are now generally available on AWS, giving enterprises a new path to build with OpenAI through the AWS environments, controls, and procurement workflows they already use. Customers can get started with OpenAI on AWS a

items.title: Boston Children’s uses AI to unlock new diagnoses
items.summary: Boston Children’s Hospital uses OpenAI technology to improve patient care, reduce operational burden, and help diagnose more than 40 rare disease cases.
